AdapterCandidate.description:
A single search-result entry from lookup(mode='search').

Epic ζ #2297 path B (live smoke 2026-04-30 follow-up) — extended with
full per-domain REST schema metadata so the LLM can read each adapter's
parameter descriptions, types, patterns, and constraints WITHOUT a
second round-trip. Each domain API has different parameter names and
structures (KOROAD adm_cd+year vs KMA base_date+base_time vs hometax
delegation_context+payload); the LLM uses ``input_schema_json`` to
judge what to fill per domain.

adapter_mode.description: Runtime source mode copied from GovAPITool.adapter_mode. The LLM uses this as transparency metadata, not as a routing key.
adapter_mode.title: Adapter Mode

citizen_facing_gate.description: AdapterRealDomainPolicy.citizen_facing_gate from the registered tool. The LLM uses this to decide whether a prior verify DelegationContext is required before invocation.
citizen_facing_gate.title: Citizen Facing Gate

delegation_source_tool_id.description: Adapter-declared verify tool that can issue the DelegationContext needed by this candidate, when applicable.
delegation_source_tool_id.title: Delegation Source Tool Id

input_schema_json.description: Full Pydantic JSON Schema (Draft 2020-12) of the adapter's input_schema, including per-field description / type / pattern / examples / ge-le constraints. The LLM reads this to fill params according to the domain API's REST shape.
input_schema_json.title: Input Schema Json

llm_description.description: Adapter usage prose (rich than search_hint). Includes ordering rules, prerequisites, scope_list semantics, and worked examples when applicable.
llm_description.title: Llm Description

output_schema_json.description: Full Pydantic JSON Schema of the adapter's output_schema. Helpful for the LLM to anticipate the shape of the result.
output_schema_json.title: Output Schema Json

primitive.description: The primitive root this adapter binds to (lookup / verify / submit / subscribe / resolve_location).
primitive.title: Primitive

real_classification_url.description: Agency-published policy URL the adapter cites (KOSMOS does not invent permission classifications).
real_classification_url.title: Real Classification Url

AdapterCandidate.title: AdapterCandidate

description: Result from lookup(mode='search'): ranked adapter candidates.
title: LookupSearchResult
